en.name: Huarong Pass
en.desc: The classic Chinese sliding block puzzle! Move blocks to help 曹操 escape through the bottom exit. A test of strategic thinking!
en.howToPlay: Click a block to select it, then use Arrow Keys to slide it into empty spaces. Only 曹操 (the red 2x2 block) can exit through the bottom center. Plan your moves carefully!
tips: Clear a path for 曹操 to reach the exit
Vertical blocks are the most challenging to move
Sometimes you need to move blocks away then back
The classic puzzle requires 81+ moves to solve

zh.name: 华容道
zh.desc: 经典的中国滑块谜题！移动方块帮助曹操从下方出口逃脱。考验战略思维！
zh.howToPlay: 点击方块选中它，然后使用方向键滑入空位。只有曹操（红色2x2方块）可以从底部中央出口离开。仔细规划你的移动！
tips: 为曹操清理一条通往出口的路径
竖直方块是最难移动的
有时需要先移开方块再移回来
